style: Flat hand-drawn 'marshmallow' vector: chunky rounded bodies, dot eyes, deep teal-charcoal outline, flat fills (green #54B49C, coral #F07854, gold #FCA848, sky #6CB4F0, grape #9C9CF0), transparent background, no shadows.
format: SVG (scalable, themeable, tiny) for all illustrations; PNG only for the 8 goal icons. Internal SVG ids are namespaced per file, so several may be inlined on one page without collisions.
mascot: The green two-leaf 'Sprout' is the companion character — its poses live in mascot/.
